if.test: search_type != null and search_type != '' and search_text != '' and search_text != ''

when.if: ORDER BY b.lend_dt DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY b.reg_dt DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY b.return_due_dt DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY b.return_dt DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY c.book_reserve DESC NULLS LAST

choose.otherwise: ORDER BY b.lend_dt DESC NULLS LAST, c.book_name

when.if: ORDER BY b.reserve_dt DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY b.lend_dt DESC NULLS LAST

choose.otherwise: ORDER BY b.reserve_dt DESC NULLS LAST, c.book_name

mapper.select:
${pagingTop}
${pagingBottom}

${pagingTop}
${pagingBottom}

${pagingTop}
${pagingBottom}

${pagingTop}
${pagingBottom}

SELECT a.lend_idx, a.book_idx, a.lend_dt, a.return_due_dt, a.return_dt, a.member_id, a.extention_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ELIB_LEND z WHERE z.return_dt IS NULL AND z.book_idx = #{book_idx}) AS book_lend FROM ELIB_LEND a WHERE a.lend_idx = #{lend_idx}

SELECT a.reserve_idx, a.book_idx, a.com_code, a.member_id, TO_CHAR(a.lendable_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lendable_dt FROM ELIB_RESERVE a, ELIB_MEMBER b WHERE a.member_id = b.member_id AND a.book_idx = #{book_idx} AND a.section = '1' ORDER BY a.lendable_dt, a.reserve_idx
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_LEND WHERE return_dt IS NULL AND member_id = #{member_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_LEND WHERE return_dt IS NULL AND book_idx = #{book_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_LEND WHERE return_dt IS NULL AND member_id = #{member_id} AND book_idx = #{book_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_RESERVE WHERE section = '1' AND member_id = #{member_id} AND book_idx = #{book_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_LEND WHERE (return_flag is null or return_flag != 'Y') AND member_id = #{member_id} AND book_idx = #{book_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE ELIB_BOOK SET book_lend = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ELIB_LEND z WHERE z.book_idx = #{book_idx} AND z.return_flag is null), book_reserve = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ELIB_RESERVE z WHERE z.book_idx = #{book_idx} AND z.section = '1'), lend_total = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ELIB_LEND z WHERE z.book_idx = #{book_idx}) WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT lend_idx, com_code, book_idx, extention_count, lend_dt, TO_CHAR(return_due_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS return_due_dt, device, member_id FROM ELIB_LEND WHERE return_flag IS NULL AND book_idx = #{book_idx} ORDER BY return_due_dt, lend_idx
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_RESERVE WHERE section = '1' AND book_idx = #{book_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_RESERVE WHERE section = '1' AND member_id = #{member_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt

${pagingTop} SELECT TO_CHAR(a.regdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS favorite_regdt, b.book_idx, b.book_code, b.book_name, b.book_image, b.com_code, b.format, b.author_name, b.book_pubname, TO_CHAR(b.book_pubdt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS book_pubdt, b.library_code, b.add_date, b.max_lend, CASE WHEN b.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE c.homepage_name END AS library_name, b.type, (SELECT comp_name FROM ELIB_COMPANY f where INSTR(f.com_code, b.com_code) > 0) AS comp_name
${pagingBottom}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_INTEREST_BOOK WHERE book_idx = #{book_idx} AND member_id = #{member_id}

SELECT a.lend_idx, a.com_code, a.book_idx, a.extention_count, a.lend_dt, a.return_due_dt, a.return_dt, a.return_flag, a.device, a.member_id, b.book_lend, b.book_code FROM ELIB_LEND a, ELIB_BOOK b WHERE a.book_idx = b.book_idx AND a.return_due_dt <= SYSDATE AND a.return_dt IS NULL
SELECT a.book_idx, a.book_code, a.com_code, a.book_name, a.book_lend, a.max_lend, a.book_reserve FROM ELIB_BOOK a WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND book_lend < max_lend AND book_reserve > 0

SELECT a.reserve_idx, a.book_idx, a.com_code, a.section, a.reserve_dt, a.lendable_dt, a.lend_dt, b.book_reserve, b.book_code FROM ELIB_RESERVE a, ELIB_BOOK b WHERE a.book_idx = b.book_idx (+) AND a.section = '1' AND a.lendable_dt <= SYSDATE ORDER BY a.reserve_idx
